---
name: Feature request
about: New indicator, symbol, timeframe, output format, or pipeline improvement
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like added or changed?**

**Why? What use case does this enable?**
<!-- Be specific: "I'm training a model that needs X because Y" is much more useful than "it would be nice to have X" -->

**Would you be willing to contribute a PR?**
- [ ] Yes, I can implement this
- [ ] I can help review/test
- [ ] No, just suggesting

**If this is a new indicator:**
- [ ] I have verified it is causal (no look-ahead) and will add a test to `test_indicators_causal.py`
